TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Walt_Bellamy, title = Walt_Bellamy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Walt_Bellamy} }

S.FORM: Walt Bellamy sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1939 , ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 7, Walt Bellamy, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Walt Bellamy sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1939 , ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 7, Walt Bellamy, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: walt βellamj s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, walt βellamj, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
